meaning: n.[医]新生儿(科)学专家(指诊断和治疗新生儿疾病的专家)
examples: A neonatologist specializes in illnesses affecting newborns, both premature and full-term.
But Andrew Lyon, consultant neonatologist at the Edinburgh Royal Infirmary, insisted there had been a "drop-off" in staff numbers.
Gould, a Stanford University neonatologist who directs the California Perinatal Quality Care Collaborative, which works with NICUs in the state.
At Renaissance, I talked with a neonatologist who trained at my hospital, in Boston, and brought McAllen new skills and technologies for premature babies.
